name: Log Retention Compliance Verification
description: Verifies that log retention policies are being enforced across all systems. Queries each log source to check actual retention periods against required minimums defined by regulatory frameworks (PCI DSS, HIPAA, SOX, etc.). Riggs AI analyzes gaps and flags systems where logs are being purged too early or retention is misconfigured. Non-compliant systems get remediation tickets; compliant systems are logged for audit evidence.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: Splunk
required_integrations.reason: Query log sources to verify actual retention periods across all indexed data

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Create remediation tickets for systems with non-compliant log retention

config.description: Triggers monthly log retention compliance verification across all systems

parameters.query: | rest /services/data/indexes | table title, currentDBSizeMB, maxTotalDataSizeMB, frozenTimePeriodInSecs, minTime, maxTime | eval retention_days=frozenTimePeriodInSecs/86400

config.description: Query all SIEM indexes to determine actual log retention periods

config.query: SELECT system_name, log_source, required_retention_days, regulatory_framework, last_verified FROM retention_policy_requirements WHERE active = true ORDER BY regulatory_framework
config.description: Load the required retention periods for each log source from the compliance policy database

config.additional_instructions: Compare actual log retention periods against required minimums. Identify systems where retention falls below regulatory requirements. Flag any gaps by regulatory framework (PCI DSS requires 1 year, HIPAA 6 years, SOX 7 years).
config.description: AI-powered gap analysis comparing actual vs. required log retention periods
Routes based on whether log retention gaps were identified

parameters.summary: Log Retention Gap: {{analyze_1.non_compliant_count}} systems below required retention

config.description: Create a Jira ticket for systems with insufficient log retention

parameters.note: Monthly log retention verification complete. All systems meet or exceed required retention periods across all regulatory frameworks.

config.description: Document that all log retention policies are compliant
Log retention compliance verification complete -- gaps documented or clean bill confirmed
